source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Clear English productivity UI with stable numeric hierarchy, harvest-planning labels, and Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese field dashboards, forms, tables, command search, and status text.
layout: Precise 8px grids, 8px radii, awn-line dividers, kernel-texture panels, grain-gold active controls, field-green navigation, dense harvest dashboards, table-first workflows, compact forms, and restrained shadows.

prompts.label: Transparent Wheat Head motif
prompts.workflow: Built-in imagegen chroma-key source on #ff00ff, processed locally with remove_chroma_key.py for transparent RGBA output.
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Wheat Head transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a single complete wheat head for a design-system catalog, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: a mature wheat head with dense golden grains, long fine awns, tan straw stem, a few narrow muted green blade hints near the stem base, accurate botanical form, crisp silhouette edges, natural grain husk texture, subtle shadowed grooves between kernels. The identity must read clearly as wheat head, not barley, rye, foxtail grass, pampas grass, corn, or a generic dried plant.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; portrait orientation; include the full seed head, long awns, and enough stem to show structure without cropping. Clean studio lighting preserving gold awn, tan straw, green blade, and shadow detail. No cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform magenta color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no field landscape, no bundle or bouquet, no hand, no vase, no ribbon, no bread, no flour, no sickle, no basket, no props, no text, no watermark, no second plant species.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Wheat Head light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board named "Morphous Wheat Head", derived from the wheat head motif shown in context: golden kernels, long wheat awns, tan straw stem, muted green blade accents, and cool green-brown shadow grooves.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the wheat head motif image. The board must visibly respect only motif-derived colors: grain gold, awn tan, straw cream, husk amber, field green, olive shadow, chaff beige, deep kernel umber, and harvest ink.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design board, 3840x2160 pixels, crisp high-resolution source asset.
Required visible sections: title, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography guidance with short readable labels such as "日本語 UI", "見出し", "本文", "状態", "数値".
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system, clear productivity system for harvest planning and field operations, precise grid, calm data dashboard, 8px card radius, awn-line dividers, grain-gold active controls, field-green success and navigation states, tan form surfaces, cool shadow borders, subtle kernel texture and awn-stripe overlays.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, charts, table rows, command palette, search field, navigation rail, dashboard metrics, empty/error/loading/success states, spacing scale, radius token, border token, shadow token, CSS variable token chips.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; include "Morphous Wheat Head", "Palette", "Type", "日本語", "Components", "Navigation", "Dashboard", "Forms", "Tables", "Command", "Status", "Tokens", "Texture", "Radius 8px", "Spacing", "Shadows".
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no orange-only palette, no beige-only palette, no bread bakery identity, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny token tables, no pure stock UI kit look.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Wheat Head dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode version of the "Morphous Wheat Head" design-system board. It must feel like the same clear productivity system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent wheat head motif and the visible light-mode Morphous Wheat Head board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, 8px radii, awn-line dividers, grain-gold active states, field-green navigation and success states, cool olive-shadow focus rings, tan straw surfaces, kernel-umber borders, harvest-ink depth, and Japanese typography guidance.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 design board, 3840x2160 pixels, crisp high-resolution source asset.
Required visible sections: title, Dark Mode, motif story, palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows, generated asset examples.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors translated for dark mode: harvest ink background, kernel umber panels, olive shadow navigation, grain-gold primary controls and charts, awn tan hover states, straw cream foreground, field green success/focus, chaff beige muted text, husk amber warnings.
Typography: include English UI examples and Japanese typography guidance with short readable labels such as "日本語 UI", "見出し", "本文", "状態", "数値".
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product design system, calm dark operations dashboard for harvest planning and field productivity, precise grid, 8px card radius, restrained contrast, subtle kernel texture, fine awn-stripe texture overlays, readable labels.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkboxes, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, charts, table rows, command palette, search field, navigation rail, dashboard metrics, empty/error/loading/success states, spacing scale, radius token, border token, shadow token, CSS variable token chips.
Text: use short readable UI labels only; include "Morphous Wheat Head", "Dark Mode", "Palette", "Type", "日本語", "Components", "Navigation", "Dashboard", "Forms", "Tables", "Command", "Status", "Tokens", "Texture", "Radius 8px", "Spacing", "Shadows".
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no orange-only palette, no bread bakery identity, no random brand names, no watermark, no illegible tiny token tables.
